data.title: Critical roles of Eyal Zamir, Caine, Cooper in shaping Iran war | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: As US President Donald Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu have made the ultimate war decisions regarding Iran, IDF and US military figures have been the next most influential players.
data.keywords: Israel,Benjamin Netanyahu,Iran,United States,Donald Trump,CENTCOM,Eyal Zamir,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion,Dan Caine
